name: Archergate License SDK
description: Machine-bound software licensing for indie developers. Validate license keys, activate on machines, manage trials. Self-hosted server with Rust SDK and C FFI.

capabilities.name: validate_license
capabilities.description: Check if a license key is valid for a specific machine. Use when a developer needs to verify a software license at application startup.

input.license_key: string - The license key to check
input.machine_fingerprint: string - SHA-256 hash of CPU + OS install ID

capabilities.name: activate_license
capabilities.description: Bind a license key to a specific machine. Use when a user purchases software and enters their key for the first time.

capabilities.name: deactivate_license
capabilities.description: Release a license from a machine so it can be activated elsewhere. Use when a user transfers to a new computer.

use_cases: Add copy protection to a VST/AU/AAX audio plugin
License a Unity or Unreal asset store product
Protect a Blender addon sold on Gumroad
Add licensing to an Electron or Tauri desktop app
Protect an Adobe plugin for Premiere or After Effects
License a game mod or development tool
